text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's New Year's. As per usual, compared with other
Umamusume, Agnes Tachyon's enthusiasm
towards racing is on the low end.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
All the same, we set our goal for this year as
winning the Classic Triple Crown.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I know her lack of enthusiasm isn't due to a lack
of motivation.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After all, if her goal is to reach even faster
speeds, she'll have to enter some races to do
that.
choice_data_list:
(I'm sure entering races will help her improve
even more!)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I grab a brush and some ink to try my hand at
some motivational calligraphy.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Happy New Year, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
It's just like you to insist we have a meeting this
early into the new year. Though...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She notices the calligraphy I'm working on.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
What do we have here? "The Classic Triple
Crown."
choice_data_list: It's our goal for this year.
It's our goal for this year.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Ah, right! I do remember you telling me that! The
prospects look positive!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Though, as I have been saying, I cannot
guarantee that I will actually enter any races.
choice_data_list:
(I really want to respect her position, but at the
same time...)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If she's going to race, now would be the time for
us to start getting the ball rolling.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Hm. You're saying it would be a waste to not
utilize the Classics, correct?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
If so, you make a valid point. Competing with
powerhouse Umamusume could be the key to a
new breakthrough in my research.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Although, like I have said in the past, or actually
just now, I—
choice_data_list:
But races are also the perfect place for data
collection!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
...Heh-heh! Aren't you a persistent one? So you
wish for me to race this badly?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Smiling, she brings her hand to her chin and goes
into deep thought.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
...Well, you might have a point. Okay. I will make
arrangements for the Satsuki Sho then.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
It's a heartfelt wish from my dear guinea—Trainer!
It would pain me to turn you down time and time
again.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Besides, the chance to collect data is an
attractive proposition!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
While we're at it, should we try to think of
strategies for the Yayoi Sho as well as the Satsuki
Sho?
choice_data_list:
(She's actually expressing interest in something
besides research!)

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Wipe that shocked look from your face. I am not
the one-dimensional character you presume me to
be.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Even a lab rat gets treats, if you know what I
mean. Anyway, what are we going to do now?
choice_data_list: Let's think about our strategy for the races!
Let's pray at the shrine for good luck!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Heh-heh! Then we shall commence our strategy
meeting!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
First, let us determine the possible contenders for
the Yayoi Sho this year.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Once we've learned their strengths, weaknesses,
and personalities, we can input that data into the
simulation and run scrimmages in VR!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
But then there's motor imagery, which,
statistically speaking, is proven to contribute to
success in various matters. We may not even need
to run simulations.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
A fifty-meter dash or even a hurdle race would be
good... But wait, what if we compiled all of the
girls' data into a chimera-like entity?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
If we configure the settings to randomly assemble
different parts of their body, can you imagine
what kinds of composites we'd give birth to? We
could mix their internal organs as well!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, how exhilarating! Let's hurry to the lab! I'm
appointing you as my assistant for the day!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I spend the rest of the day monitoring her
research and keeping her from breaking any
scientific code of ethics.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Hmm? You mean you want to relax and savor the
mood of New Year's together?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Are you sure? You know I'm not used to this kind
of thing.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Well, I suppose that is true. The high sugar
content will prove valuable as a source of energy
for the brain and training.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
No, wait. Why go to such lengths with this
inefficient method of ingestion when I can just
take glucose directly?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Yes, that settles it. Guinea pig, fetch me some
glucose tablets from the shops over there!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
While you're at it, get some vitamin B9 and iron
supplements too! Oh, and ethanol!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And just like that, I spend the rest of New Year's
Day running her personal errands.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Pray to the shrine, you say? To be frank, I'm not
so familiar with the custom.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Don't get me wrong, I find it quite interesting. At
the end of the day, it comes down to a
reaffirmation of sentiment, doesn't it?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Wait a moment... If you make a wish, this may
present me an opportunity to observe its placebo
effect up close!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Yes! The first shrine visit of New Year's doesn't
sound bad at all! What are you waiting for? Let's
go!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
And we must get fortune slips too while we're at
it! Great fortune or great misfortune would be
ideal!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While we're at the shrine, she pesters me
relentlessly about the wishes I made.
